items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the persona scenario of waiting for sold-out group events, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the behavior of the system in this context. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the specific scenario of waitlisting for sold-out events, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the expected outcome. Without concrete evidence or traces related to this scenario, it is impossible to determine if the behavior is supported or if it results in a failure report.
